greeting: Blessings upon you, traveller. I walk this road in devotion, as my fathers did before me.
The road is long but the spirit is willing. Have you seen the chapel at Pilgrim's Rest?
I carry nothing but faith and a water-skin. It is enough.
quest: I dropped my prayer book at the last river crossing. It was my grandmother's — the only thing of hers I still possess. Would you retrieve it for me?
idle: Each step brings me closer to grace...
The birds sing psalms, if you listen closely.
